name: Aubrey Morris
ai_summary: Aubrey Morris brings 5 years of childcare experience with infants through age 10 and is based in Herriman, UT with a 40-mile travel radius. Her bubbly, easygoing nature and proven conflict resolution skills make her well-suited to create positive, supportive environments for children.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Aubrey. I have been working in childcare for about five years with babysitting. I've worked with ages from infants toddlers, all the way to like 10 years old. I'd say I'm a good fit for childcare. I would say I'm friendly and easy to for kids to come to and talk with. I would also say
 Say that I know how to handle situations? Well when it comes to children.
 And yeah, I think I'd be a great fit.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Herriman Utah on. I am able to travel from 40 miles out.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time. I currently have a part-time job so I'm looking for something to fill in the extra hours that I have available in my schedule and yeah.
transcripts.q6:
I have dealt with if I was babysitting a family, like the kids getting an arguments are fighting over toys or just something like that. I have been able to deal with conflict pretty well in making things fair, for both kids. So they both understand that fighting is not the way to get what they want, but
 But also, so they don't feel like they're being punished.
transcripts.q7: I think I'd make a great up, kid teacher, just because I'm a bubbly person. I'm easy to talk to, and I love helping people. That is something about me that I think is.
